summary: Tested all new TrustOS enhancements: Admin Dashboard, 5 products, MEDIUM risk timer+QR flow, HIGH risk 4-step flow, and Admin Dashboard YOU badge after completing transaction.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20 new features tested and passed. Admin Dashboard shows pre-seeded 10 transactions + newly completed ones with YOU badge. 5 products visible (Cloud API LOW, Sneakers MEDIUM, Collectible Sneakers HIGH $195 score 120.3, Swiss Watch MEDIUM $850 score 59.6, MacBook HIGH). MEDIUM flow: 2hr-8hr timer window shown, fast-forward works, QR scan required before confirm btn enabled. HIGH flow: 4 steps (OTP 847291→Video→QR Seal→Checklist all working). Admin stats update after completion. Filter buttons and LIVE toggle work. Monitor btn turns dark when admin open.

test_results.admin_stats_cards: PASS - Total:11(after 1 tx), LOW:2, MEDIUM:4, HIGH:5, Released:81.8%
test_results.5_products_visible: PASS - Cloud API, Sneakers, Collectible Sneakers, Swiss Luxury Watch, MacBook
test_results.medium_timer_window: PASS - Shows 2 hr - 8 hr Confirmation Period
test_results.high_4_steps: PASS - OTP, Video, QR Seal, Checklist
test_results.admin_you_badge_after_completion: PASS - YOU badge visible on completed transaction
